exchanges.prompt: Design an AWS serverless API with API Gateway, Lambda, DynamoDB, S3, and CloudWatch monitoring

response.content:
graph TD
    A[Client] -->|HTTPS Request| B(API Gateway)
    B -->|Invoke| C(AWS Lambda)
    C -->|Read/Write| D(DynamoDB)
    C -->|Upload/Download| E(S3)
    C -->|Logging| F(CloudWatch Logs)
    F -->|Metrics| G(CloudWatch Metrics)
    G -->|Triggers| C
    E -->|Notification| C
    D -->|Stream| C
    style A fill:#f9f,stroke:#333,stroke-width:4px
    style B fill:#ccc,stroke:#333,stroke-width:4px
    style C fill:#ccc,stroke:#333,stroke-width:4px
    style D fill:#ccc,stroke:#333,stroke-width:4px
    style E fill:#ccc,stroke:#333,stroke-width:4px
    style F fill:#ccc,stroke:#333,stroke-width:4px
    style G fill:#ccc,stroke:#333,stroke-width:4px
